parameters.content:
## FAQ Storage & Usage

This stage formats and stores the final results.

It ensures:

FAQs are structured into Q&A format (Q1–Q5, A1–A5)
Data is clean and consistent
Results are saved to Google Sheets

This makes the output easy to access, reuse and share with clients.

## AI-Powered FAQ Generation

This stage combines all prepared data into one context.

It uses AI to:

Analyze market trends and portfolio performance
Generate 5 relevant client questions
Provide clear, one-line answers

The output is focused on practical and client-friendly insights.

## Automated Data Collection

This workflow runs every Monday at 8:00 AM.

It collects data from:

Market news via API
Portfolio data from Google Sheets

These two sources provide the foundation for generating relevant client insights.

values.content: =You are an assistant that generates client FAQs based on provided context. Output **exactly 5 FAQs only** with short, simple answers. Do not generate more than 5.

=Here is the client portfolio:{{ $json.Portfolio }}  and news context:{{ $json["Prepare News"] }}

You are a financial assistant.

Based on news + portfolio context, generate 5 FAQs clients may ask this week.

Rules:
- Focus on trends, risks, opportunities
- Keep answers very simple (1 line)
- Avoid generic questions
- Make them practical for investors
STRICT FORMAT (do not change):
Q1: question
A1: answer
Q2: question
A2: answer
Q3: question
A3: answer
Q4: question
A4: answer
Q5: question
A5: answer

parameters.content:
## Auto FAQ Generator for Clients
### Overview

This workflow automatically generates weekly client-ready investment FAQs by combining real-time market news with portfolio performance data. It ensures clients receive timely, relevant and easy-to-understand insights—helping you stay proactive and consistent in communication.

### How It Works:
The workflow runs every Monday at 8:00 AM
It fetches the latest tech-focused market news
It pulls current and historical portfolio data from a spreadsheet
It analyzes portfolio risk levels and performance changes
Both datasets are formatted and merged into a single context
An AI model generates 5 practical FAQs with simple answers
The structured FAQs are extracted and saved to Google Sheets for use or sharing

### Setup Steps: 
1. Schedule Trigger
Configure the workflow to run weekly (Monday at 8:00 AM)

2. Collect Market News
Use an HTTP Request node to fetch top headlines (e.g., TechCrunch)
Add a fallback message if no news is available

3. Retrieve Portfolio Data
Connect Google Sheets to load portfolio data
Format asset details (current value, last week value, risk level)

4. Analyze Portfolio
Calculate:

Number of high-risk assets
Assets losing value

5. Combine Data
Merge news data and portfolio insights into one structured input

6. Generate FAQs
Use an AI node to:

Create exactly 5 relevant client questions
Provide short, clear, one-line answers
Focus on trends, risks and opportunities

7. Structure Output
Parse the AI response into structured Q&A fields (Q1–Q5, A1–A5)

8. Store Results
Save FAQs into Google Sheets for tracking or reuse

9. (Optional) Share Output
Distribute FAQs via email, dashboard or client communication tools

assignments.name: Prepare News
assignments.value: No major market news this week. Focus on portfolio performance

assignments.name: Portfolio

parameters.content:
## Data Preparation & Portfolio Analysis

This stage prepares and enriches the collected data.

It includes:

Formatting news into readable summaries
Handling missing news with a fallback message
Structuring portfolio data (current value, past value, risk level)
Analyzing portfolio trends (high-risk assets, declining assets)

This ensures the data is clean, structured and insight-ready.
